grids.catalog: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-8

navigation.style: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F9F6F0]/80 border-b border-[#E2DAC8]/50
navigation.links: text-sm tracking-widest uppercase font-medium hover:text-amber_dark transition-colors
navigation.mobile: hamburger menu opening a full-screen or sliding organic overlay

buttons.primary: bg-[#8F9E8B] text-[#F9F6F0] hover:bg-[#6A7B66] rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300 ease-out flex items-center justify-center font-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#8F9E8B] text-[#2A3B2C] hover:bg-[#8F9E8B] hover:text-[#F9F6F0] rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300 ease-out font-medium

cards.base: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-[#E2DAC8] overflow-hidden group hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-300
cards.image: object-cover w-full h-full group-hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-700 ease-out

inputs.base: bg-transparent border-b border-[#2A3B2C]/20 rounded-none px-0 py-3 focus:outline-none focus:border-[#8F9E8B] focus:ring-0 placeholder:text-[#5C6B5D]/50 transition-colors

hero.layout: min-h-[90vh] flex flex-col justify-center relative overflow-hidden
hero.image_overlay: Absolute inset-0 z-0. Image should have a subtle gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-r from-[#F9F6F0]/90 to-[#F9F6F0]/40) to ensure text readability.

bento_features.description: Used for 'How Aromatherapy Heals'. Grid of organic shaped cards (mixing span-4, span-8, tall and wide cards). Soft shadow-sm, earthy background colors varying slightly per card.

timeline.description: Used for 'History of Aromatherapy'. Vertical line with alternating left/right content blocks. Heavy use of negative space, serif typography for dates, and subtle scroll-triggered fade-ups.

footer.text: Contrasting light text on dark forest green. Large typography for brand name/slogan.

animations.scroll: Smooth scrolling via Lenis is mandatory. Use framer-motion for staggered fade-up on text blocks and subtle parallax on images.
animations.hover: Images in cards scale up slightly (1.05x). Buttons have a slight lift or color shift.
animations.page_transition: Gentle fade in with a very subtle upward motion (y: 20 -> 0).

hero_background.description: Close-up of aromatic oil being poured into a glass beaker, sets a premium moody and holistic tone.

history_timeline_bg.description: Close up of botanical plant with sage green leaves, used as a subtle background or accent image in the timeline.

category_diffuser_blends.description: Essential oil bottles with handwritten labels.

category_plants.description: Close up of a calm botanical plant.

blog_placeholder_1.description: Woman holding white plastic bottle, representing wellness routines.

blog_placeholder_3.description: A hand touching a bottle of essential oils.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: 'yarn add framer-motion lenis lucide-react react-router-dom'.
Use standard HTML/Tailwind for marketing sections. Use Shadcn components minimally, mostly for Admin Dashboard (tables, forms).

Apply 'Cormorant Garamond' for all H1-H3 headings. Use 'Manrope' for body text. Update index.css with appropriate @import or next/font if applicable (assume standard web fonts approach, add Google Fonts links in index.html).
The products page should NOT have a cart. Replace standard 'Add to Cart' with an 'Inquire' button (can open a simple mailto: or a generic contact modal).
Implement the 'Bento Grid Protocol' for the 'How Aromatherapy Heals' section on the Home page. Assymetrical boxes with different spans.
Ensure 'data-testid' is added to all interactive elements.
